records.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 8.5 minimum; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.representation: convergent ordered-metadata sparse m16n8k32 signed INT8 inline PTX in the combined coverage kernel
stages.detail: The production generated_intrinsics route produced 214,910-byte compute_80 NVVM IR with SHA-256 1c3668d8f8d712f3ea880fded2e10a7e9e4f4265f24f738f104d5bde8e7aee6c and 61,044-byte LTOIR with SHA-256 901eed79871048a57271f434b99bab16cccd7169be6629d6cdb0498bb8f95ece. The ordered raw calls use one compile-time selector per variant and exercise both 0 and 1 across the family.

stages.representation: combined standard and ordered sparse m16n8k32 INT8 coverage kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 22,632-byte cubin with SHA-256 ae24b75fec8d2c8d668765c2513a34c6d707f3acef48d6e106cf256028d72c26; cuobjdump contained 20 IMMA.SP.16832 instructions across the standard and ordered coverage. The ordered half contains all eight raw variants plus two representative compatibility-path calls.
